name: Gr Round Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the stuffing ingredients to taste.
2. Cut off the tops of the green peppers and remove the seeds and membrane.
3. Cook the green peppers in boiling salted water for about 5 minutes, then drain.
4. Sprinkle the inside of each pepper with salt.
5. Brown the ground steak and onions in hot fat.
6. Add tomatoes, rice, Worcester sauce, and seasonings to taste.
7. Cover and simmer until the rice is nearly tender, about 5 minutes.
8. Stir in the shredded cheese.
9. Stuff the peppers and place them upright in a 10 x 6 inch baking dish.
10. Bake uncovered at moderate heat (350°F) for 25 minutes or until hot.
11. Sprinkle additional shredded cheese on top of each pepper.
Makes 6 servings.
